subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify the features of expository writing
Use the sample outline to develop an essay

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: An expository essay aims to instruct, inform, explain, criticise, or analyse issues.

sections.heading: Features and Outline
sections.content: The note stresses logical presentation, use of facts and illustrations, clear explanation of ideas, and use of the present tense. The sample outline is based on 'The Problem With Nigeria'.
